title: Create Flinnylicious
description: Modpack designed for users of the Flinny server. The goal of the pack is to retain clean integrations and a focus on the Create power system, while adding some long form content for server longevity and exploration.
body: Modpack designed for users of the Flinny server. Unlike our original this pack is not a fork of another but rather a fully unique pack. The goal of the pack is to retain clean integrations and a focus on the Create power system, while adding some long form content for server longevity and exploration. The goal in total being to have an experience that is still open to player expression, but not providing a modpack with a clear progression structure or features that are too complex compared to vanilla. While the pack itself does not add many mods, it does have the intended goal of using the few mods it adds to greatly improve available content in a way that befits our playerbase. The pack includes standard quality of life options such as Sodium, Supplementaries, Not Enough Animations and Flywheel, as well as more modifying options like Tectonic for terrain updating, Farmer's Delight for additional food farming, as well as create additions to allow for compatibility between the given mods.
